scripts.install:check: zsh -lc 'tmp=$(mktemp -d "${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/personal-pi-install-check.XXXXXX"); node scripts/install-or-update.mjs --source . --skip-pi-install --skip-package-install --agent-dir "$tmp"; rc=$?; rm -rf "$tmp"; exit $rc'
scripts.models:core: pi --list-models openai-codex && pi --list-models github-copilot && pi --list-models openrouter
